title: steampipe Helm chart values
description: Configuration values for the Steampipe Helm chart. Deploys Steampipe as a persistent PostgreSQL endpoint on Kubernetes.

image.description: Container image configuration for the Steampipe main container.

repository.description: Container image registry and repository (default: ghcr.io/devops-ia/steampipe).

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to Chart.appVersion if empty.

imagePullSecrets.description: Registry secret names for private container registries.

nameOverride.description: Partially override the chart fullname (keeps the release name prefix).

create.description: Create a ServiceAccount for this chart.

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the ServiceAccount (e.g., IAM role ARN for IRSA).

name.description: Name of the ServiceAccount. Generated from fullname if empty.

automountServiceAccountToken.description: Mount the SA token into pods. Required for kubernetes plugin.

deploymentAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the Deployment resource.

podSecurityContext.description: Pod-level security context. Defaults: fsGroup=9193, runAsUser=9193, runAsGroup=0.

securityContext.description: Container-level security context. Defaults: runAsNonRoot=true, runAsUser=9193.

command.description: Override the container command. Leave empty to use default entrypoint.

args.description: Arguments passed to steampipe service start. Default: ["--foreground"].

env.description: Environment variables for the Steampipe container (list of {name, value} or {name, valueFrom}).

livenessProbe.description: Custom liveness probe. Auto-configured as tcpSocket on bbdd port when bbdd.enabled=true.

readinessProbe.description: Custom readiness probe. Auto-configured as tcpSocket on bbdd port when bbdd.enabled=true.

startupProbe.description: Custom startup probe. Auto-configured as tcpSocket on bbdd port when bbdd.enabled=true.

bbdd.description: PostgreSQL database service configuration. Enable to expose Steampipe as a ClusterIP/LoadBalancer service.

enabled.description: Create a Kubernetes Service for the PostgreSQL endpoint.

svcAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the database Service.

ingress.description: Ingress configuration. WARNING: Steampipe exposes PostgreSQL (TCP), not HTTP. A TCP-capable Ingress controller is required.

resources.description: CPU/memory resource requests and limits for the Steampipe container.

nodeSelector.description: Node label selector for pod scheduling.

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for pod scheduling.

extraVolumes.description: Additional volumes to mount (e.g., plugin .spc configs from Secrets/ConfigMaps).

extraVolumeMount.description: Additional volume mounts for the Steampipe container.

extraContainers.description: Additional sidecar containers to add to the pod.

extraObjects.description: Extra Kubernetes manifests to deploy alongside the chart (CronJobs, NetworkPolicies, etc.).

initContainer.description: Init container configuration. Installs Steampipe plugins before the main container starts. Uses the same image as the main container.

image.description: Init container image pull policy. Repository and tag are inherited from the main image.

pullPolicy.description: Pull policy for the init container.

securityContext.description: Security context for the init container.

resources.description: CPU/memory resource requests and limits for the init container.

plugins.description: List of Steampipe plugins to install (e.g., ['aws', 'gcp', 'kubernetes']).

extraInitVolumeMount.description: Additional volume mounts for the init container.
